description: A perpetual collection of retro videogame books of the fiction variety. Novels, children's books, "choose your own adventures," gamebooks, and interactive computer stories. As more are collected, or whenever the 15+ year mark rolls around each year past the original publication, more items will be added. When that happens, you will find updates placed below this post. Current file size (uncompressed): 2.77 GB Format: pdf, .epub, .cbz, .mobi, .azw, and .cbr Files in this collection : 187 A Magic Micro Adventure: Captain Kid and the Pirates (1985) A Magic Micro Adventure: Superworld (1985) A Magic Micro Adventure: The Cats of Castle Mountain A Magic Micro Adventure: Wizards of Wonder Arcade Explorers: Revenge of the Raster Gang (1985) Arcade Explorers: Save the Venturians (1985) Arcade Explorers: The Electronic Hurricane (1985) Arcade Explorers: The Magnetic Ghost of Shadow Island (1985) At the Heart of the Mountain: A BASIC Adventure for the Commodore 64 (1984) Baldur's Gate (1999) Baldur's Gate II: Shadows of Amn (2000) Baldur's Gate II: Throne of Bhaal (2001) BASIC Adventures in Space: Part 1 - The Alien Planet (1983) Bio Hazard: The True Story Behind Biohazard (1997) Child of the Chaos (2004) Diablo: Demonsbane (2000) Diablo: Legacy of Blood (2001) Diablo: The Black Road (2002) Diablo: The Kingdom of Shadow (2002) Divine Divinity (Story - 2002) Doom (Movie Adaptation - 2005) Doom 3: Worlds on Fire (2008) Doom: Endgame (1996) Doom: Hell on Earth (1995) Doom: Infernal Sky (1996) Doom: Knee-Deep in the Dead (1995) Douglas Adams' Starship Titanic (1998) Dragon Quest IV: Legend in the Dark (1991) Dragon Quest: Item Story (1989) Dragon Quest: Monster Story (1989) Dragon's Lair: The Rescue of Princess Daphne (1984) Dredd Vs.
